curation_notes: Locations derived from the patch diff (PR #4970). The patch fixes 4 source files across the H2 and MySQL JDBC storage query DAOs where user-supplied keywords were directly string-concatenated into SQL LIKE clauses. The fix replaces concatenation with parameterized queries using concat('%',?,'%') and adds the keyword to the parameters list. H2MetadataQueryDAO has two vulnerable functions (searchServices and searchEndpoint). No sibling files (MySQLTraceQueryDAO, H2LogQueryDAO) contained the same vulnerable pattern. The pre-assigned sql-injection class is correct based on the CWE-89 mapping and the patch diff.
